titleStmt.title: SII 28.103: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 103. (A.R. No. 258 of 1913.) VAYIRAPURAM, TINDIVANAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Fragmentary. In characters of the 12th century.

Records the gift of land in two plots of 500 kuḻi each, one of which was kitchen-garden-land (kollai), the chilvari (the miscelleaneous minor taxes), peruvari (major taxes) on which, they undertook to desist from collecting, to God Śrī-Mūlasthānam-uḍaiya-Mahādēvar of their ūr by the ūrār of Vayiramēghapuram in Tirunalūr-nāḍu in Oymā-nāḍu. It was stipulated that one śivabrāhmaṇa having kāṇi of that temple would take over the land and supply the requirements for services in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tu Oymāṉāṭṭut tiruṉalūr ṉāṭṭu vayiramekapurattūro
m Eṅkaḷur śrīmulasthāṉamuṭaiya mahādevaṟkku ṉāṅka
ḷiṟai Iḻicci viṭṭa ṉilamāvatu ṉaṭuviṟ kaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟkku
Erikiḻiṉinṟum Iraṇṭāñ catirattu puḷiyañ ceṟuvukkuk kiḻa
kkut tirupperur ceṟukkuḻi Aiñnūṟum kollaiyālum cu
ṭukāṭṭu Oḻuṅkaikku meṟkuc cūlakkollaikuḻi Aiññūṟum
cilvari peruvari Epperppaṭṭatum koḷḷak kaṭavatanṟākavum
Inṉilaṅ kaikkoṇṭu śrīmulasthānamuṭaiyār koyil
kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇan vatsagotrattuc centapirān
ciṅkaḷāntakanāṉa dakṣiṇāmurtti bhaṭṭan Oru sandhikku nānāḻi Ari Continuation not available.
Digital edition of SII 28.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
